summary: Iteration 49 - Track Editing, Promo Code CRUD & Validation Testing Complete. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/promo-codes - Lists all promo codes (LAUNCH50 found with 50% off)
Backend: POST /api/admin/promo-codes - Creates new promo code successfully
Backend: PUT /api/admin/promo-codes/{id} - Toggles active status correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/promo-codes/{id} - Deletes promo code and verifies removal
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate - LAUNCH50 returns valid=true, 50% off, 3 months
Backend: POST /api/promo-codes/validate - Invalid code returns 404
Backend: Admin promo endpoints return 401 without authentication
Backend: GET /api/releases - Returns releases with tracks
Backend: PUT /api/tracks/{trackId} - Updates all track fields (title, version, explicit, isrc, dolby_isrc, iswc, language, production, publisher, preview_start, preview_end, main_artist)
Backend: GET /api/health - Health check passed
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login returns token and role=admin
Frontend: Admin Promo Codes page (/admin/promo-codes) loads with AdminLayout sidebar
Frontend: Promo Codes title visible
Frontend: 'New Promo Code' button present and opens create form
Frontend: Create form has all fields (code, discount_type, discount_value, max_uses, duration_months, applicable_plans, expires_at)
Frontend: LAUNCH50 promo code displayed with 50% off, RISE/PRO badges, 3 months, 0/100 used, ACTIVE status
Frontend: Toggle and delete buttons present on promo code cards
Frontend: Release detail page loads with track list
Frontend: Edit track button (pencil icon) present on each track
Frontend: Clicking edit expands full track form with all 12 fields
Frontend: Track form fields verified: title, title_version, explicit, isrc, dolby_atmos_isrc, iswc, audio_language, production, publisher, preview_start, preview_end, main_artist
Frontend: Generate ISRC buttons present for both Audio ISRC and Dolby Atmos ISRC
Frontend: Save and Cancel buttons present in edit form
Frontend: Pricing page (/pricing) loads with promo code section
Frontend: Promo code input field and Apply button present
Frontend: Applying LAUNCH50 shows 'Code applied! 50% off for 3 months'
critical_code_review_comments: Promo code CRUD endpoints properly protected with admin role check (401 without auth)
Track update endpoint correctly validates allowed fields and persists changes
Frontend TrackForm component has proper data-testid attributes for all fields
Promo code validation endpoint correctly returns discount calculation
AdminPromoCodesPage has proper form validation and error handling
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account and LAUNCH50 promo code
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 tested three features: 1) Track editing with full form (ISRC, Dolby ISRC, ISWC, Language, Production, Publisher, Preview Times, Artists) - all fields working via PUT /api/tracks/{trackId}. 2) Promo Code admin CRUD at /api/admin/promo-codes (create, list, toggle, delete) - all protected with admin auth. 3) Promo code validation at /api/promo-codes/validate - returns discount calculation. LAUNCH50 promo code exists with 50% off for Rise/Pro plans for 3 months. The release 'Test Release for Distribution' has 2 tracks with audio uploaded.

track_editing.frontend_form: TrackForm component with all fields and Generate ISRC buttons

promo_code_crud.auth_protection: All endpoints require admin role (401 without auth)
promo_code_crud.frontend_page: /admin/promo-codes with create form and code list

promo_code_validation.returns: valid, code, discount_type, discount_value, duration_months, discounted_price, original_price
